steps.title: Model the revenue
steps.content:
If $n$ products are sold, the price has decreased $n$ times by $2.50$, so the price is $120-2.50n$. The revenue is:
$$n(120-2.50n)$$

steps.title: Reject impossible counts
steps.content: Choice B gives $24(60)=1{,}440$, which is too high. Choices C and D would require more than $48$ decreases of $2.50$, making the price negative. The answer is A.
